must_do.full_text:
Github acaba de ☠️ al vibe coding

Acaba de publicar spec-kit y en pocos días tiene 95k estrellas y 8.3k forks

Esto no es un proyecto cualquiera. Es GitHub diciéndote cómo se programa con IA de verdad.

El problema con los agentes de IA no es el modelo

Es que le mandas una idea https://t.co/9YgkCq0x4K
must_do.summary: GitHub发布spec-kit项目，数日内获95k星标和8.3k fork。这是GitHub官方展示真实AI编程方式的指南，揭示AI代理的核心问题不在模型本身，而在于任务定义。
viral_signals: 反常识：AI代理问题根源不在模型
angles: GitHub官方杀死vibe编程：95k星的spec-kit揭秘真实AI编程法则
AI代理的真正瓶颈不是模型，而是这个被忽视的细节
数日95k星：GitHub如何用spec-kit重新定义AI编程范式

must_do.full_text: NEW: The White House is reportedly demanding Anthropic make Fable 5 impossible to jailbreak before rerelease — which security experts say “can’t be done.”

must_do.full_text:
I was wrong

I've been saying for months that open source AI models are 6 months behind frontier

They caught up. GLM 5.2 is as good as Opus 4.8

This changes everything. If you run GLM 5.2 locally no government can take it away. You become sovereign

And even if you run through

GPT-5.4 helped drive a medicinal chemistry project from literature review to a validated experimental result.

priority.full_text:
This model is insane at design.

I asked GLM 5.2 (left) and Opus 4.8 (right) to build me a landing page and you can't even tell the difference.

GLM cost $0.06 while opus cost $0.49. More than 6x cheaper while being faster + more token efficient.

Another win for open source AI. https://t.co/FJCYROq9Lr
priority.summary: GLM 5.2与Opus 4.8设计能力对比，GLM成本仅为1/6且更快。具体价格对比、开源AI胜利的叙事，信息差明显。
angles: GLM 5.2碾压Claude Opus，成本仅1/6
开源AI逆袭：性能相同价格天差地别
设计AI对标测试：GLM vs Opus谁更强

priority.full_text: This is so perplexing. Do you think they just asked chatGPT how to get rid of algae from water and didn’t specify that they were dealing with 26 million litres of water
priority.summary: 用户调侃可能有人问ChatGPT如何去除水中藻类，却没说明是2600万升的大规模水处理。反映AI工具在实际应用中的信息不完整问题。
angles: ChatGPT翻车现场：2600万升水的藻类问题
AI工具的致命缺陷：信息不完整导致方案失效
为什么AI回答需要你补充关键细节
